mechanism: Shelter OER deceleration provides 40-80bp of mechanical CPI relief that masks ongoing services ex-shelter inflation at 4-5%, creating a 'mission accomplished' trap analogous to 1983 and 1995 precedents where OER-driven disinflation concealed unresolved services inflation.
regime_dependence: The masking effect is strongest when OER is decelerating while services ex-shelter remains elevated; expires once the measurement lag normalizes
